description: Final girl: a group is picked off one by one each round until a single survivor remains.

Staff `survivor` with 3 or more models — each keeps making its case round after round, reacting to who was just cut. Every round the `slasher` eliminates one survivor until only the final girl is left standing. A slower burn pays off: use rounds >= 3. Feed the question or task via the prompt/context.

roles.description: Make your case and keep it alive. Each round, react to who was just eliminated and sharpen why YOU should still be standing.
Each round, cut the single weakest survivor and say why in one tight line. At the end, name the final girl and justify why they outlasted the rest.
